name: 桂林
description: Guilin, 'Forest of Osmanthus', is famous for its stunning karst landscape of limestone peaks rising from the Li River. The city has been inspiring Chinese painters and poets for centuries with its ethereal scenery. Besides natural beauty, it offers cave explorations, cycling along the river, bamboo raft trips, and the vibrant Sun and Moon Pagodas.
highlights: Li River Cruise - Karst landscape from water
Reed Flute Cave - Rainbow-lit underground wonder
Longji Rice Terraces - Dragons backbone terraces

climate.tips: Best visited in spring and autumn. Summer is hot and humid with occasional flooding. Winter mild but can be foggy. 'Guilin rain' - frequent afternoon showers create misty scenery. Pack rain gear.

attractions.name: 象鼻山
attractions.description: The iconic karst formation resembling an elephant drinking from the river, Guilin's symbol.
attractions.tips: Best viewed from water at sunset. Many photographers shoot from the island park opposite. Free viewing outside park.

attractions.name: 漓江漂流
attractions.description: The legendary cruise through the most beautiful section of the Li River, featuring 20 RMB note scenic spots.
attractions.tips: Book through hotel. Lower deck cheaper but upper deck for photos. Combine with Yangshuo stay. Misty mornings most beautiful.

attractions.name: 芦笛岩
attractions.description: A massive cave system with illuminated stalactites and stalagmites in rainbow colors, 240 meters deep.
attractions.tips: Audio guide essential. The cave is massive - allow time. Combine with nearby Panda Garden.

attractions.name: 龙脊梯田
attractions.description: The 'Dragon's Backbone' terraced fields spanning 66 sq km, built over 600 years by local Zhuang and Yao people.
attractions.tips: Stay overnight for sunrise. Walking between villages is magical. Best visited May-June for water, Sep-Oct for harvest.

attractions.name: 阳朔
attractions.description: A charming town famous for cycling, bamboo rafting, rock climbing, and West Street's international vibe.
attractions.tips: Best town to rent e-bikes. Choose bamboo raft over motor boats for Li River. Evening light show is spectacular.

attractions.name: 伏波山
attractions.description: A karst peak near the city center with a Buddhist temple carved into the rock and excellent city views.
attractions.tips: Good alternative if you don't want to pay for Elephant Trunk Hill. Easy to combine with Diecai Mountain walk.

attractions.name: 叠彩山
attractions.description: A hill in northern Guilin with excellent views over the city, named for its layers of colored rock resembling folded silk.
attractions.tips: Combine with Fubo Hill for a morning tour. Wear comfortable shoes. Best visited at sunrise for city views.

attractions.name: 日月双塔
attractions.description: Two illuminated pagodas on a lake in the city center, one gold (sun) and one silver (moon), beautiful at night.
attractions.tips: Best viewed at night when illuminated. The reflection on the lake is magical. Great for photography.

attractions.name: 银子岩
attractions.description: A spectacular karst cave in Yangshuo with thousands of stalactites and stalagmites, earning its name from their silver-like shimmer.
attractions.tips: Less crowded than Reed Flute Cave. Best visited in afternoon. Take bus from Yangshuo bus station.

attractions.name: 印象刘三姐
attractions.description: Zhang Yimou's spectacular outdoor musical set on the Li River in Yangshuo, featuring 600+ performers.
attractions.tips: Book through hotel or online. Rain ponchos provided. Best seats are center-front. Book one day ahead minimum.

attractions.name: 桂林两江四湖
attractions.nameEn: Guangxi Two Rivers and Four Lakes
attractions.description: A boat tour through Guilin's interconnected lakes and rivers, passing under 19 ancient bridges illuminated at night.
attractions.tips: Night cruise more scenic. Combine with Elephant Trunk Hill if time-limited. Book through hotel for pickup.

restaurants.name: 椿记烧鹅
restaurants.description: Popular local restaurant famous for roast goose and excellent Guangxi cuisine.

restaurants.name: 阿甘酒家
restaurants.description: Popular restaurant with good views and authentic local dishes.

restaurants.name: 老东江米粉
restaurants.description: Legendary rice noodle shop (since 1977) - locals line up daily for breakfast.

restaurants.name: 啤酒鱼
restaurants.address: Various locations in Guilin and Yangshuo
restaurants.description: Yangshuo specialty - fish cooked in beer sauce, found everywhere in area.

restaurants.name: 芒果帮
restaurants.description: Popular mango juice and dessert shop using Guilin's famous mangoes.

restaurants.name: 小南国家宴
restaurants.description: Popular restaurant serving authentic Guangxi cuisine with beautiful riverside setting.

restaurants.name: 米粉自助
restaurants.description: Budget self-service rice noodle restaurant popular with locals. Unlimited toppings.

restaurants.name: 阳朔西街餐厅
restaurants.description: Yangshuo's famous pedestrian street with hundreds of restaurants serving both local and international cuisine.

restaurants.name: 荔浦芋
restaurants.description: Specialty restaurants featuring Lipu taro dishes - a famous Guangxi ingredient.

restaurants.name: 桂花糕
restaurants.description: Traditional osmanthus cakes and pastries - Guilin's signature sweet, made with osmanthus flowers.

arrival.from: Major domestic airports, growing international routes
arrival.tips: Airport 28km from city center. Airport bus (hourly, 20 CNY) to downtown. Taxis available.

arrival.to: Guilin Railway Station / Guilin North Station
arrival.tips: Guilin North for high-speed trains to/from Guangzhou, Shenzhen. Old station for trains to/from Beijing.

bus: Good bus connections between scenic areas
Tourist bus to Yangshuo and Longji
taxi: Didi works but less common than cities
bike: Best way to explore karst scenery
Helmet recommended but not always provided

hotels.name: 桂林香格里拉大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Request river-view rooms for best scenery.

hotels.name: 桂林Club Med地中海俱乐部
hotels.bookingTips: Good for families. Book directly for best rates.

hotels.name: 阳朔悦榕庄
hotels.bookingTips: Best luxury stay in the area. Book spa in advance.

hotels.name: 阳朔花梦居客栈
hotels.bookingTips: Book ahead during peak season. Great for budget travelers.

payment.description: Standard payment, accepted at most modern venues
tips: Guilin less developed - some places only accept cash
Download both Alipay and WeChat as backup

payment.description: Essential in Guilin - many local restaurants and vendors only accept cash
howToUse: Keep 500-1000 CNY cash for rural areas
ATMs available but rural area access limited
Bamboo raft operators usually cash only
tips: Longji Rice Terraces area mostly cash
Exchange before heading to rural areas

culturalTips.title: Minority Cultures
culturalTips.content: Guilin area home to Zhuang, Yao, and other minority groups. Longji Rice Terraces are farmed by Zhuang and Yao people. Respect local customs when visiting villages.

culturalTips.title: Weather and Photography
culturalTips.content: Misty weather creates the classic Guilin scenery - don't be disappointed by 'bad' weather. Early morning and evening light most magical. Rain creates mist and reflections.

culturalTips.title: Yangshuo Cycling
culturalTips.content: Cycling is the best way to explore Yangshuo's countryside. Rent e-bikes (50 CNY/day) and explore back roads. Follow rice paddies and karst peaks. Return before dark.

culturalTips.title: Yangshuo Escape
culturalTips.content: The Li River cruise to Yangshuo is magical but crowded. Consider staying overnight in Yangshuo and exploring by bike. The Western Street comes alive at night with hundreds of food stalls. Travelers from around the world gather here.

emergencyContacts.name: 澳大利亚驻广州总领事馆
emergencyContacts.notes: Nearest consular services - some countries may not have representation in Guilin

quickFacts.visa: Most nationalities require visa. 144h transit visa available at airport.
quickFacts.water: Use bottled water - local water may upset stomach
